nits.issue: JSONB write `${JSON.stringify(filters)}::jsonb` — project memory prefers sql.json(); consistent with rest of codebase.

buildScheduleTargetInput packs automationId + triggeredBy='schedule' but basics-cron-kicker doesn't honor them. Schedule WILL fire; resulting cloud_runs row lacks automation_id linkage until D.5/D.6 extend the kicker.
Index-based diff: PUT [B] over [A,B] does remove(A@0)+add(B@0)+remove(B@1) — wasteful. composio_webhook hazard if two triggers share event_type (handler locks to first row).
loadComposioTriggerRow keys on (automation_id, event_type) — multi-same-event composio_webhook triggers can't be distinguished; consider trigger_index column.
callback_url derivation falls back to literal https://api.trybasics.ai. Pull from dedicated cfg.API_PUBLIC_URL eventually.
createTrigger body shape (toolkit_slug/trigger_name/connected_account_id/trigger_config) is a best-guess off openapi.json. Live integration is the source of truth.
Partial-failure orphans: Composio + DB are not transactional; reconciler/cleanup job is a follow-up.
teardownAllTriggers reuses reconcile with empty workspace/account/goal strings; cleaner to extract a dedicated teardown fn.
